description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden shelving unit with three evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by two solid vertical side panels. The side panels are slightly contoured at the top, adding a subtle decorative touch to the otherwise utilitarian design. The shelves are open and lack any doors, drawers, or backing, making the contents easily accessible from the front. The wood has a medium brown finish, giving it a warm and classic appearance suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and shelves that can support moderate weight. This type of shelf is commonly used for storing books, tools, or small items in garages, workshops, or on sidewalks for temporary displays.
description: A medium brown, freestanding wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and contoured side panels. Sturdy and accessible, ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and the contoured tops of the side panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the panels and the decorative contour at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with visible panel thickness and contour.
